prompt: The decision titled "Default-on value refs" was later reversed. What is the CURRENT decision that replaced it? Give its exact title.

ground_truth.sparql: SELECT DISTINCT ?s ?title WHERE { GRAPH <https://moosedev.dev/kg/project> { ?old <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label> "Default-on value refs" . ?s ?p ?old . FILTER(STRENDS(STR(?p),"supersedes")) ?s <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label> ?title } }
